name: OnAvbReceive
title: OnAvbReceive
syntax: void OnAvbReceive(dword listenerHandle, dword result, int buffer[], dword length); // form 1
void OnAvbReceive(dword listenerHandle, dword result, long buffer[], dword length); // form 2
void OnAvbReceive(dword listenerHandle, dword result, byte buffer[], dword length); // form 3
description: This callback is dispatched when an asynchronous receive operation on a Listener completes.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The specific result code of the operation. If the operation completed successfully the value is zero. Otherwise the value is non-zero.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer into which the data was stored.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The length of the received data.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
